SOURCE: 40018190.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (40018190.pdf)
SUMMARY: Experience in network/hardware/operating system troubleshooting, web page design, PC assembly, technical support, and customer service. Analytical Helpdesk technician adept at resolving complex issues.
SKILLS: Sharepoint, Cisco Telephony tools, Bomgar, Visio, Que Monitoring, SAP, Active Directory, Mobileiron, HPSM, IOS

SOURCE: 40018190.pdf
JOB TITLE: IT Support Technician
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 12/2014 - Current
DESCRIPTION: Provide technical assistance and support for computer systems, software, and hardware. Respond to queries in person or over the phone. Vast troubleshooting capabilities with IOS. Train computer users. Maintain daily performance of computer systems. Process 15-20 inbound and outbound technical support calls daily.

SOURCE: 40018190.pdf
JOB TITLE: Network Assistant Intern
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 01/2014 - 05/2014
DESCRIPTION: Assisted University network administrator with daily tasks including wireless, VDI, patchwork. Network infrastructure, hardware management, and server room operations.

SOURCE: 40018190.pdf
JOB TITLE: Technology Assistant Intern
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 08/2013 - 05/2014
DESCRIPTION: Maintained 489 page University website. Managed and completed daily work orders for University Help Desk. Attended weekly administrative technology meetings. Managed/deployed hardware and software to student body as well as faculty.

SOURCE: 40018190.pdf
DEGREE: Bachelor of Science
INSTITUTION: William Woods University
